washing_instructions: Machine wash cold with down-specific detergent, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low with dryer balls to restore loft. Do not iron or bleach.

name: Youth 'Cosmic Explorer' Graphic Hoodie
washing_instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Do not iron on print.

name: Men's Modern Tech Blazer
washing_instructions: Dry clean recommended. Can machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Do not bleach. Iron on low heat.

name: Unisex Blade Logo Print T-Shirt
washing_instructions: Hand wash recommended. Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Do not bleach or tumble dry.

name: UA Iso-Chill Run Short Sleeve Tee
washing_instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not iron. Do not use softeners.

name: Converse Kids' Classic Chuck Patch Logo T-Shirt
washing_instructions: Machine wash cold inside out, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Do not iron on print.
